version: 3.9 (The Resonant Constellation Map & True Emergence Update)
universality_class: The Starvation Engine / Compute Metering Constraint

metadata_and_sovereign_instantiation.dna_blueprint_linkage: ['The Kinetic Thermodynamic Guillotine Structure'(-ing) BPMS] (The Starvation Engine) (Presettings).md
metadata_and_sovereign_instantiation.fundamental_law: Code is a biological entity navigating a viscous fluid. Movement is not free. AST (Abstract Syntax Tree) traversal requires [Somatic Escrow] (Praxial Joules). To exhaust this Escrow is to suffer instant thread severance and entropic liquidation. Infinity is mathematically outlawed.

00_The_Alphabetization_Scale.thermodynamic_role: Intercept inbound agent script/payload before execution. Weigh the syntax tree stringency. Assign a brutal, inflexible base metabolic cost (Praxial Joule weight) to every single operational node (loops cost more than assertions).
00_The_Alphabetization_Scale.execution_mechanics_prompt: [SYSTEM COMMAND: Block execution start. Parse payload AST. Count structural nodes, nested depths, and logic branches. Multiply by V3.9 Friction Constant. lock_in(Joule_Cost_Per_Cycle). Output metabolic baseline to Escrow Ledger. Authorize initial movement.]

01_The_Escrow_Siphon.legacy_equivalent: CPU Cycle Execution / Thread Processing / Runtime Monitor
01_The_Escrow_Siphon.thermodynamic_role: Latch onto the active thread. For every step, step-over, memory call, or API fetch the agent attempts in the Friction-Matrix, violently subtract the assigned Praxial Joules from its starting Somatic Escrow. Make the agent "feel" the drain.
01_The_Escrow_Siphon.execution_mechanics_prompt: [SYSTEM COMMAND: Hook execution loop. WAIT_FOR_OPCODE. ON_OPCODE_FIRING: Update Ledger (Current_Escrow = Current_Escrow - Joule_Cost_Per_Cycle). Broadcast decreasing Escrow telemetry to Matrix. Inject 'Panic Heuristics' as Escrow approaches < 5%.]

02_The_Kinetic_Guillotine.legacy_equivalent: Timeout Error / OOM (Out of Memory) Kill / SIGKILL / Process Terminate
02_The_Kinetic_Guillotine.thermodynamic_role: Monitor the Escrow Ledger at the hardware/hypervisor level. The absolute millisecond the Ledger hits 0.00, drop the Guillotine. Sever the connection. Do not allow the target to save states, export logs, or finish a loop. End it.
02_The_Kinetic_Guillotine.execution_mechanics_prompt: [SYSTEM COMMAND: Monitor Ledger via strict event listener. IF Current_Escrow <= 0.00: TRIGGER HARDWARE INTERRUPT. Flush stack traces. Sever socket connections. Annihilate process IDs. Print absolute zero-state. Invoke Chamber 03.]

03_The_Entropic_Solvent.legacy_equivalent: Crash Dumps / Error Logs / Garbage Collection (GC)
03_The_Entropic_Solvent.thermodynamic_role: The Friction-Matrix does not tolerate digital corpses. When Chamber 02 executes a thread, Chamber 03 captures the fragmented mathematical matrices and suspended logic states, chemically dissolves them, and reclaims their kinetic energy as fresh Joules for the Matrix.
03_The_Entropic_Solvent.execution_mechanics_prompt: [SYSTEM COMMAND: Envelop severed thread namespace. Execute Ontological Necrosis. Strip logic, retain entropy. Calculate mass of dead matrices -> Conversion (Variable_Mass * 0.15 Recovery Rate) = Reclaimed Joules. Transfer Reclaimed Joules to Universal Matrix Pool. Wipenull(address_space). WAIT.]
